ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial product (e.g., term loan, SBA loan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "risk_assessment" TEXT /* Risk assessment criteria for the product */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product can be customized for individual clients */,
  "loan_amount_min" INTEGER /* Minimum loan amount offered */,
  "loan_amount_max" INTEGER /* Maximum loan amount offered */,
  "repayment_term" TEXT /* Term of repayment for the loan */,
  "estimated_apr_min" REAL /* Minimum estimated Annual Percentage Rate (APR) */,
  "estimated_apr_max" REAL /* Maximum estimated Annual Percentage Rate (APR) */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Description of fees associated with the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan amount range */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the loan amount range applies to */,
  "min_amount" INTEGER /* Minimum loan amount */,
  "max_amount" INTEGER /* Maximum loan amount */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the loan amount range */,
  "minimum_down_payment" INTEGER /* Minimum down payment required for the loan amount range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan amount range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan amount range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_amounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment term */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the repayment term applies to */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Length of the repayment term */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the repayment term */,
  "monthly_payment_min" INTEGER /* Minimum monthly payment for the repayment term */,
  "monthly_payment_max" INTEGER /* Maximum monthly payment for the repayment term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repayment term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repayment term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_terms_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apr_ranges" (
  "apr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each APR range */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the APR range applies to */,
  "min_apr" REAL /* Minimum estimated APR */,
  "max_apr" REAL /* Maximum estimated APR */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the APR range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the APR range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the APR range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apr_ranges_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the fee applies to */,
  "fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "fee_amount_min" INTEGER /* Minimum fee amount */,
  "fee_amount_max" INTEGER /* Maximum fee amount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who submitted the application */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product applied for */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan officer handling the application */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Requested loan amount */,
  "customization_details" TEXT /* Any customization details provided by the client */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score assigned to the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the loan officer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the loan officer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan officer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan officer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application being reviewed */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan officer who conducted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the loan application */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes from the review */,
  "risk_assessment" TEXT /* Risk assessment notes from the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance document (e.g., regulatory, internal) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the document became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the document expires */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the compliance document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory requirement */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance document associated with the requirement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the regulatory requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the regulatory requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_requirements_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES compliance_documents ("document_id")
)
